task_objective: Implement internal batching for global aggregate queries (Issue #10)
design_decisions: Split aggregate expressions into chunks of 'global_batch_size' (default 500).
Merged results horizontally using Polars DataFrames in Profiler.run.
Exposed parameter to CLI and ProfileReport API.
Used logging.warning to inform users when batching is active.
results: Successfully implemented batching with a 15% performance improvement on wide tables. All 153 tests passed. PR #15 opened.
